steps.title: Notice the ordered evidence
steps.content: The previous sentence begins with First, introducing one reason the burial site was likely the tomb of a king. The next sentence adds another separate reason.

steps.title: Continue the sequence
steps.content: The transition must continue the numbered order of evidence. A would signal substitution, B would signal contrast or concession, and C would introduce a detail of the first reason rather than a second reason. The answer is D.
